name: Corn, Scallion and Red Pepper Quesadilla
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fresh or frozen corn, thawed
1/2 red bell pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Place two tortillas on a baking sheet.
3. Top one layer of tortilla with cheese, corn, scallion, red pepper, and cilantro.
4. Cover with the remaining two tortillas.
5. Bake for 10 minutes or until the cheese melts.
6. Alternatively, substitute any leftover cooked vegetables for fresh vegetables.
